title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS enables AI coding agents to work effectively with AWS services by providing up-to-date documentation, best practices, guardrails, and tested procedures. The toolkit reduces hallucinations and improves agent success rates through structured knowledge and permissions management, with deployment examples including Lambda and API Gateway integration.
